spec_match.rationale: Subscribes to native PerformanceObserver events dynamically and parses their real structures into a collapsible JSON explorer.

interactive.rationale: Incredibly high fidelity playground offering type toggles, interactive layout shift triggers, dynamic navigation, and a nested JSON detail tree.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Fully aligned with the Observer Playground description.

edge_cases.rationale: Cleanly handles unsupported browser pathways with isolated mock fallbacks and lists the browser's real supported list dynamically.

references.rationale: Violates repository hard rule: does not contain a link to chromestatus.com/feature/5144837209194496.

design_system.rationale: Visuals are clean and follow design system rules.

openQuestions.title: Add ChromeStatus link (hard rule violation)
openQuestions.detail: The page does not contain a link to chromestatus.com/feature/5144837209194496, which violates the repository hard rule that every concept page must include a ChromeStatus link.
